name: Lansenger (蓝信)
description: Lansenger enterprise messaging channel plugin for OpenClaw / 蓝信企业即时通讯频道插件

lansenger.label: Lansenger (蓝信)
lansenger.description: Lansenger enterprise messaging channel / 蓝信企业即时通讯频道

enabled.description: Enable or disable this channel / 启用或禁用此频道

configWrites.description: Allow Lansenger to write config in response to channel events (e.g., auto-setting homeChannel) / 允许蓝信写入配置（如自动设置主聊天窗口）

name.description: Display name for this account / 此账号的显示名称

appId.description: Lansenger bot App ID / 蓝信机器人 App ID（格式：orgId-applicationId）

appSecret.description: Lansenger bot App Secret / 蓝信机器人 App Secret

apiGatewayUrl.description: Lansenger API Gateway URL / API 网关地址（默认：https://open.e.lanxin.cn/open/apigw）

dangerouslyAllowPrivateNetwork.description: Allow sendImageUrl to fetch from private/internal networks (RFC1918, link-local, metadata IPs). SSRF protection blocks these by default. Only enable in trusted/isolated environments. / 允许 sendImageUrl 从内网获取图片（RFC1918、link-local、metadata IP）。默认禁止，仅在可信/隔离环境中启用。

mediaLocalRoots.description: Directories allowed for local file/media delivery. If empty, all paths are allowed. Restrict to prevent agents from accessing arbitrary files. / 允许发送本地文件的目录列表。为空时允许所有路径，设置后可防止 agent 访问任意文件。

allowFrom.description: List of Lansenger user IDs allowed to DM the bot / 允许私聊机器人的蓝信用户 ID 列表

dmPolicy.description: DM security policy / 私聊安全策略：pairing (配对验证，推荐), allowlist (仅列表用户), open (任何人), disabled (禁用私聊)

groupPolicy.description: Group chat policy / 群聊策略：open (所有群), allowlist (仅允许列表群), disabled (禁止群消息)

groupAllowFrom.description: User IDs allowed to trigger the bot in group chats (sender-level filter, NOT group IDs). Lansenger user IDs and group IDs share the same format — confirm via API or logs. / 群聊中允许触发机器人的用户 ID 列表（用户级过滤，不是群 ID）。蓝信用户 ID 和群 ID 格式相同，请从 API 或日志确认。

requireMention.description: Require @mention to trigger in groups (can be overridden per-group) / 群聊中是否需要 @提及才触发（可在单群配置中覆盖）

autoMentionReply.description: Auto @mention the sender when replying in groups. Lansenger API auto-prepends the name — no need to manually write @Name in the message. / 群聊自动回复时是否 @发送者。蓝信 API 会自动拼接名字，无需在消息中手动写 @姓名。

autoQuoteReply.description: Auto quote the inbound message when replying (groups and DMs) / 回复时是否自动引用入站消息（群聊和私聊均生效）

groups.description: Per-group configuration / 单群配置（key 为群聊 chatId）

requireMention.description: Require @mention to trigger / 是否需要 @提及才触发

autoMentionReply.description: Auto @mention the sender when replying in this group / 该群自动回复时是否 @发送者

autoQuoteReply.description: Auto quote the inbound message when replying in this group / 该群回复时是否自动引用入站消息

enabled.description: Enable/disable this group / 启用/禁用该群

allowFrom.description: Sender IDs allowed in this group. If set, only these users can trigger the bot in this group. / 该群允许的发送者 ID。设置后仅这些用户可在该群触发机器人。

homeChannel.description: Default chat ID for cron/notification delivery / 定时任务/通知的默认聊天 ID（自动从第一条私聊消息检测）

ackMessage.description: Send a brief 'received, processing...' acknowledgment message before the agent starts processing. Language is auto-detected from the user's message. / 在代理处理前发送一条简短的'收到，正在处理...'确认消息。语言根据用户消息自动检测。

revokeAckMessage.description: Auto-revoke the ack message after the agent reply is delivered. Set to false to leave the ack message visible (some users prefer seeing it over a 'message revoked' system notice). / 代理回复送达后自动撤回确认消息。设为 false 则保留确认消息可见（有些用户宁愿看到确认消息也不愿看到撤回的系统通知）。

ackMessageTextZh.description: Chinese ack message text (used when user writes in Chinese) / 中文确认消息文案（用户使用中文时）

ackMessageTextEn.description: English ack message text (used when user writes in English) / 英文确认消息文案（用户使用英文时）

execApprovals.description: Exec approval configuration. Falls back to commands.ownerAllowFrom when not set. / 执行审批配置。未设置时 fallback 到 commands.ownerAllowFrom。

approvers.description: Lansenger user IDs allowed to approve exec commands / 允许审批执行命令的蓝信用户 ID 列表

accounts.description: Multi-bot configuration / 多机器人配置（key 为 AppId）

enabled.description: Whether this bot is enabled / 是否启用

name.description: Display name for this account / 此账号的显示名称

appId.description: Bot App ID / 机器人 App ID

appSecret.description: Bot App Secret / 机器人 App Secret

apiGatewayUrl.description: API Gateway URL / API 网关地址

dangerouslyAllowPrivateNetwork.description: Allow sendImageUrl from private networks (inherits top-level if unset, default false) / 允许从内网获取图片（未设置时继承顶层配置，默认 false）

mediaLocalRoots.description: Directories allowed for local file delivery (inherits top-level if unset) / 允许发送本地文件的目录列表（未设置时继承顶层配置）

allowFrom.description: Allowed user IDs / 允许的用户 ID 列表

dmPolicy.description: DM security policy / 私聊安全策略

groupPolicy.description: Group chat policy / 群聊策略

groupAllowFrom.description: User IDs allowed to trigger the bot in group chats (sender-level filter, NOT group IDs). Inherits from top-level if unset. / 群聊中允许触发机器人的用户 ID 列表（用户级过滤，不是群 ID）。未设置时继承顶层配置。

requireMention.description: Require @mention to trigger in groups (inherits from top-level if unset) / 群聊中是否需要 @提及才触发（未设置时继承顶层配置）

autoMentionReply.description: Auto @mention the sender when replying in groups (inherits from top-level if unset) / 群聊自动回复时是否 @发送者（未设置时继承顶层配置）

autoQuoteReply.description: Auto quote the inbound message when replying (inherits from top-level if unset, applies to groups and DMs) / 回复时是否自动引用入站消息（未设置时继承顶层配置，群聊和私聊均生效）

ackMessage.description: Send ack message before agent processing (inherits from top-level if unset) / 代理处理前发送确认消息（未设置时继承顶层配置）

revokeAckMessage.description: Auto-revoke ack message after agent reply (inherits from top-level if unset, default true) / 代理回复后自动撤回确认消息（未设置时继承顶层配置，默认 true）

ackMessageTextZh.description: Chinese ack message text (inherits from top-level if unset) / 中文确认消息文案（未设置时继承顶层配置）

ackMessageTextEn.description: English ack message text (inherits from top-level if unset) / 英文确认消息文案（未设置时继承顶层配置）

execApprovals.description: Exec approval configuration for this account. Falls back to commands.ownerAllowFrom when not set. / 该账号的执行审批配置。未设置时 fallback 到 commands.ownerAllowFrom。

approvers.description: Lansenger user IDs allowed to approve exec commands for this account / 允许审批该账号执行命令的蓝信用户 ID 列表

groups.description: Per-group configuration for this account / 该账号的单群配置（key 为群聊 chatId）

enabled.description: Enable/disable this group for this account / 启用/禁用该群

requireMention.description: Require @mention to trigger / 是否需要 @提及才触发

autoMentionReply.description: Auto @mention the sender when replying / 自动回复时是否 @发送者

autoQuoteReply.description: Auto quote the inbound message when replying / 回复时是否自动引用入站消息

allowFrom.description: Sender IDs allowed in this group / 该群允许的发送者 ID

enabled.label: Enabled / 启用
enabled.help: Enable or disable the Lansenger channel / 启用或禁用蓝信频道

configWrites.label: Config Writes / 配置写入
configWrites.help: Allow Lansenger to auto-write config (e.g., homeChannel) in response to channel events / 允许蓝信在收到消息事件时自动写入配置（如主聊天窗口）

name.label: Display Name / 显示名称
name.placeholder: e.g. QAX Bot / 奇安信机器人
name.help: Optional display name for this channel account / 此频道账号的可选显示名称

appId.label: App ID / 蓝信 App ID
appId.help: Lansenger Desktop → Contacts → Bots → Personal Bots → click ℹ️ icon to view credentials. Mobile client does NOT support viewing credentials. / 蓝信桌面端 → 通讯录 → 智能机器人 → 个人机器人 → 点击右侧 ℹ️ 图标查看凭证。移动端不支持查看凭证。

appSecret.label: App Secret / 蓝信 App Secret
appSecret.help: Lansenger Desktop → Contacts → Bots → Personal Bots → click ℹ️ icon to view credentials. Mobile client does NOT support viewing credentials. / 蓝信桌面端 → 通讯录 → 智能机器人 → 个人机器人 → 点击右侧 ℹ️ 图标查看凭证。移动端不支持查看凭证。

apiGatewayUrl.label: API Gateway URL / API 网关地址
apiGatewayUrl.help: Default: https://open.e.lanxin.cn/open/apigw (Lansenger public cloud). Custom gateway for enterprise deployments is also supported. / 默认：https://open.e.lanxin.cn/open/apigw（蓝信公有云）。也支持企业私有化部署的自定义网关地址。

dangerouslyAllowPrivateNetwork.label: Allow Private Network Images / 允许内网图片
dangerouslyAllowPrivateNetwork.help: Allow sendImageUrl to fetch from private/internal networks. SSRF protection blocks these by default. Only enable in trusted/isolated environments. / 允许 sendImageUrl 从内网获取图片，默认 SSRF 防护禁止，仅在可信/隔离环境中启用。

mediaLocalRoots.label: Media Local Roots / 本地文件目录
mediaLocalRoots.placeholder: Add directory path / 添加目录路径
mediaLocalRoots.help: Directories allowed for local file/media delivery. If empty, all paths are allowed. Restrict to prevent agents from accessing arbitrary files. / 允许发送本地文件的目录。为空时允许所有路径，设置后可防止 agent 读取任意文件。

allowFrom.label: Allow From / 允许的用户
allowFrom.placeholder: Add user ID / 添加用户 ID
allowFrom.help: Lansenger user IDs allowed to send DMs to the bot (format: orgId-applicationId) / 允许向机器人发送私聊的蓝信用户 ID（格式：orgId-applicationId）

dmPolicy.label: DM Policy / 私聊安全策略

enumLabels.allowlist: Allowlist Only / 仅允许列表用户
enumLabels.open: Open to All / 对所有人开放

dmPolicy.help: Recommended: pairing — first DM triggers pairing code, approve with 'openclaw pairing approve lansenger <code>'. Personal bots only receive DMs from their owner. / 推荐：pairing — 首次私聊触发配对码，用 'openclaw pairing approve lansenger <配对码>' 审批。个人机器人仅接收归属人的私聊消息。

homeChannel.label: Home Channel / 主聊天窗口
homeChannel.placeholder: Auto-detected from first DM / 自动从第一条私聊消息检测
homeChannel.help: Default chat for cron/notifications. Auto-set from first p2p message / 定时任务/通知的默认聊天窗口，自动从第一条私聊消息设置

ackMessage.label: Ack Message / 确认消息
ackMessage.help: Send a brief acknowledgment message before the agent processes. Language is auto-detected. / 在代理处理前发送确认消息，语言自动检测。

revokeAckMessage.label: Revoke Ack Message / 撤回确认消息
revokeAckMessage.help: Auto-revoke the ack message after the agent reply. Set false to keep the ack visible (avoids 'message revoked' system notices). / 代理回复后自动撤回确认消息。设为 false 则保留确认消息可见（避免出现撤回的系统通知）。

ackMessageTextZh.label: Ack Text (Chinese) / 确认文案（中文）
ackMessageTextZh.help: Chinese acknowledgment text / 中文确认消息文案

ackMessageTextEn.label: Ack Text (English) / 确认文案（英文）
ackMessageTextEn.help: English acknowledgment text / 英文确认消息文案

groupPolicy.label: Group Policy / 群聊策略

enumLabels.allowlist: Allowlist (Selected Groups) / 仅允许列表中的群

groupPolicy.help: Controls which groups can trigger the bot. Recommended: open — for personal bots, the owner already controls who can add the bot to groups. / 控制哪些群可以触发机器人。推荐：open — 个人机器人由主人控制谁能把它拉到群里。

groupAllowFrom.label: Group Allow From / 群聊允许的用户
groupAllowFrom.placeholder: Add user ID / 添加用户 ID
groupAllowFrom.help: Lansenger user IDs allowed to trigger the bot in group chats (sender-level filter, NOT group IDs). Lansenger user IDs and group IDs share the same format — confirm via API or logs. / 群聊中允许触发机器人的蓝信用户 ID（用户级过滤，非群 ID）。蓝信用户 ID 和群 ID 格式相同，请从 API 或日志确认。

groups.label: Per-Group Config / 单群配置
groups.help: Enable/disable individual groups and fine-tune per-group settings (requireMention, autoMentionReply, enabled, allowFrom). Key is group chatId. For allowlist mode (groupPolicy=allowlist), add groups with enabled: true. / 逐群启用/禁用和微调设置。key 为群聊 chatId。allowlist 模式时配置 enabled: true 加入白名单。

accounts.label: Multi-Bot Accounts / 多机器人账号
accounts.help: Configure multiple bots with independent App IDs. Route to different agents using top-level bindings config. / 配置多个机器人，每个机器人有独立的 App ID。多 Agent 路由使用顶层 bindings 配置。

accounts.*.enabled.label: Enabled / 启用
accounts.*.enabled.help: Enable/disable this bot account / 启用/禁用该机器人账号

accounts.*.name.label: Display Name / 显示名称
accounts.*.name.help: Display name for this bot account / 此机器人账号的显示名称

accounts.*.appId.label: App ID / 蓝信 App ID
accounts.*.appId.help: Personal bot App ID for this account / 该账号的个人机器人 App ID

accounts.*.appSecret.label: App Secret / 蓝信 App Secret
accounts.*.appSecret.help: Personal bot App Secret for this account / 该账号的个人机器人 App Secret

accounts.*.apiGatewayUrl.label: API Gateway URL / API 网关地址
accounts.*.apiGatewayUrl.help: Custom gateway for enterprise deployments / 企业私有化部署的自定义网关地址

accounts.*.dangerouslyAllowPrivateNetwor.label: Allow Private Network Images / 允许内网图片
accounts.*.dangerouslyAllowPrivateNetwor.help: Allow sendImageUrl from private networks for this bot (inherits top-level if unset, default false) / 该机器人允许从内网获取图片（未设置时继承顶层配置，默认 false）

accounts.*.mediaLocalRoots.label: Media Local Roots / 本地文件目录
accounts.*.mediaLocalRoots.help: Directories allowed for local file delivery for this bot (inherits top-level if unset) / 该机器人允许发送本地文件的目录（未设置时继承顶层配置）

accounts.*.allowFrom.label: Allow From / 允许的用户
accounts.*.allowFrom.help: Lansenger user IDs allowed to DM this bot / 允许私聊该机器人的蓝信用户 ID

accounts.*.dmPolicy.label: DM Policy / 私聊安全策略

enumLabels.allowlist: Allowlist Only / 仅允许列表用户
enumLabels.open: Open to All / 对所有人开放

accounts.*.dmPolicy.help: DM security policy for this bot / 该机器人的私聊安全策略

accounts.*.groupPolicy.label: Group Policy / 群聊策略

enumLabels.allowlist: Allowlist (Selected Groups) / 仅允许列表中的群

accounts.*.groupPolicy.help: Group chat policy for this bot / 该机器人的群聊策略

accounts.*.groupAllowFrom.label: Group Allow From / 群聊允许的用户
accounts.*.groupAllowFrom.placeholder: Add user ID / 添加用户 ID
accounts.*.groupAllowFrom.help: Lansenger user IDs allowed to trigger this bot in group chats (sender-level filter, NOT group IDs). Inherits from top-level if unset. / 群聊中允许触发该机器人的蓝信用户 ID（用户级过滤，非群 ID）。未设置时继承顶层配置。

accounts.*.ackMessage.label: Ack Message / 确认消息
accounts.*.ackMessage.help: Send ack message for this bot (inherits from top-level if unset) / 该机器人是否发送确认消息（未设置时继承顶层配置）

accounts.*.revokeAckMessage.label: Revoke Ack Message / 撤回确认消息
accounts.*.revokeAckMessage.help: Auto-revoke ack for this bot after agent reply (inherits from top-level if unset, default true) / 该机器人代理回复后自动撤回确认消息（未设置时继承顶层配置，默认 true）

accounts.*.ackMessageTextZh.label: Ack Text (Chinese) / 确认文案（中文）
accounts.*.ackMessageTextZh.help: Chinese ack text for this bot / 该机器人中文确认文案

accounts.*.ackMessageTextEn.label: Ack Text (English) / 确认文案（英文）
accounts.*.ackMessageTextEn.help: English ack text for this bot / 该机器人英文确认文案

accounts.*.groups.label: Per-Group Config / 单群配置
accounts.*.groups.help: Per-group configuration for this account (requireMention, enabled, allowFrom). Overrides section-level groups. / 该账号的单群配置，覆盖顶级 groups 设置。
